sourceNotes: Phase 2 Telendos low cleanup 2026-05-28: CavoBlue supports Pnigmenos as a sandy beach on southern Telendos, southwest of the early Christian necropolis below Rafi canyon, reached by boat or about 20 minutes on foot from the settlement, with two large tamarisk trees for shade and no fixed service claim. No live condition claim was encoded.

High-confidence Telendos follow-up 2026-06-02: CavoBlue Greek/English pages and DIVELOG support Pnigmenos identity, sandy beach character, southern Telendos location, access by boat or about 20 minutes on foot from the settlement, tamarisk shade and non-organized setup. No windProfile, scoring, live calm/protected/safe, or ideal-beach claim was changed.

metadata.sourceNotes: Phase 2 final South Aegean low-evidence cleanup 2026-05-25: no direct source is recorded for stronger access/confidence claims; record kept as low-confidence baseline until source-backed review. Phase 2 OSM singleton source pass 2026-05-27: OSM relation 541090 is a same-name Papa Beach natural=beach feature at or very near the current Telendos Paralia Papa coordinates. Source supports identity/location only for this pass; confidence, access, services, amenities, and recommendation logic remain unchanged pending stricter local review.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 Telendos low cleanup 2026-05-28: CavoBlue supports Chochlakas/Hohlakas as a pebbly Telendos beach beside the settlement, reached on foot in about 5 minutes with some steps or by boat, with no trees, rocky seabed, and organized status. Kalispera supports Hohlakas as the two-part beach west of the village and notes sun loungers for rent. No live condition claim was encoded.

High-confidence Telendos follow-up 2026-06-02: CavoBlue and Kalispera provide consistent direct evidence for Chochlakas/Hohlakas identity, short walking access from the settlement, pebbly/rocky beach character, rocky seabed and limited seasonal loungers. No windProfile, scoring, live calm/protected/safe, or ideal-beach claim was changed.

sourceNotes: Source follow-up pass 49: Telendos travel-location page supports Potha beach identity/location on Telendos. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Mamaka Tours and CavoBlue support Potha on Telendos as a beach north of the port/settlement, about 10 minutes on foot, reachable by foot or boat, with pebble/sand terrain and occasional seasonal umbrellas/loungers. No live calm/clear claim was added.

Island confidence pass 2026-06-05: promoted to high for static beach facts only after reviewing direct island/beach source coverage for recorded access, terrain, depth, shade and service context. Source scenic/calm/clear wording was not imported into scoring, windProfile, photos, water-quality, or live condition claims.

sourceNotes: Source follow-up pass 49: CavoBlue Telendos page supports Paradise beach identity/location. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

CavoBlue supports Paradise on Telendos as a small organized nudist beach with sand/fine pebbles, reached on foot from the port in about 20 minutes. Mamaka Tours also places Paradise as the extension after Potha. No live condition claim was added.

Island confidence pass 2026-06-05: promoted to high for static beach facts only after reviewing direct island/beach source coverage for recorded access, terrain, depth, shade and service context. Source scenic/calm/clear wording was not imported into scoring, windProfile, photos, water-quality, or live condition claims.
